trivia_bullets.text: Only printing; first appeared in Magic 2015 (M15, July 2014), the annual core set that introduced Convoke as a returning evergreen mechanic for the year. M15 was the first core set to prominently credit outside artists with individual card billing as a showcase format.

Convoke mechanic (each creature tapped while casting pays for 1 or one mana of its color) is self-referential with the flavor text: the casting mechanic enacts the assembly process, with your creatures participating in building the golem. EDHREC rank 25,108 — fringe Commander presence. Legal in Pauper and Paupercommander.
"The modular nature of the automaton's design makes assembly perfectly intuitive." — no named speaker.
Illustrated by Jason Felix, a MTG artist with extensive work across multiple sets including numerous artifact and creature cards. No specific design commentary on this card has been located.
